substructure_type.title: substructure type
substructure_type.description: The substructure or under building is that largely hidden section of the building which is built off the foundations to the ground floor level

sulfate.name: sulfate
sulfate.title: sulfate
sulfate.description: Concentration of sulfate in the sample

sulfate_fw.name: sulfate_fw
sulfate_fw.title: sulfate in formation water
sulfate_fw.description: Original sulfate concentration in the hydrocarbon resource

sulfide.name: sulfide
sulfide.title: sulfide
sulfide.description: Concentration of sulfide in the sample

surf_humidity.name: surf_humidity
surf_humidity.title: surface humidity
surf_humidity.description: Surfaces: water activity as a function of air and material moisture

surf_material.name: surf_material
surf_material.title: surface material
surf_material.description: Surface materials at the point of sampling

surf_temp.name: surf_temp
surf_temp.title: surface temperature
surf_temp.description: Temperature of the surface at the time of sampling

suspend_solids.name: suspend_solids
suspend_solids.title: suspended solids
suspend_solids.description: Concentration of substances including a wide variety of material, such as silt, decaying plant and animal matter; can include multiple substances

sym_life_cycle_type.name: sym_life_cycle_type
sym_life_cycle_type.title: symbiotic host organism life cycle type
sym_life_cycle_type.description: Type of life cycle of the symbiotic host species (the thing being sampled). Simple life cycles occur within a single host, complex ones within multiple different hosts over the course of their normal life cycle

symbiont_host_role.name: symbiont_host_role
symbiont_host_role.title: host of the symbiont role
symbiont_host_role.description: Role of the host in the life cycle of the symbiotic organism

tan.name: tan
tan.title: total acid number
tan.description: Total Acid Number (TAN) is a measurement of acidity that is determined by the amount of potassium hydroxide in milligrams that is needed to neutralize the acids in one gram of oil. It is an important quality measurement of crude oil. (source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Total_acid_number)

target_gene.name: target_gene
target_gene.title: target gene
target_gene.description: Targeted gene or locus name for marker gene studies

target_subfragment.name: target_subfragment
target_subfragment.title: target subfragment
target_subfragment.description: Name of subfragment of a gene or locus. Important to e.g. identify special regions on marker genes like V6 on 16S rRNA

tax_class.name: tax_class
tax_class.title: taxonomic classification
tax_class.description: Method used for taxonomic classification, along with reference database used, classification rank, and thresholds used to classify new genomes
examples: vConTACT vContact2 (references from NCBI RefSeq v83, genus rank classification, default parameters)

tax_ident.name: tax_ident
tax_ident.title: taxonomic identity marker
tax_ident.description: The phylogenetic marker(s) used to assign an organism name to the SAG or MAG

temp.name: temp
temp.title: temperature
temp.description: Temperature of the sample at the time of sampling

temp_out.name: temp_out
temp_out.title: temperature outside house
temp_out.description: The recorded temperature value at sampling time outside

tertiary_treatment.name: tertiary_treatment
tertiary_treatment.title: tertiary treatment
tertiary_treatment.description: The process providing a final treatment stage to raise the effluent quality before it is discharged to the receiving environment

time_last_toothbrush.name: time_last_toothbrush
time_last_toothbrush.title: time since last toothbrushing
time_last_toothbrush.description: Specification of the time since last toothbrushing

time_since_last_wash.name: time_since_last_wash
time_since_last_wash.title: time since last wash
time_since_last_wash.description: Specification of the time since last wash

timepoint.name: timepoint
timepoint.title: timepoint
timepoint.description: Time point at which a sample or observation is made or taken from a biomaterial as measured from some reference point. Indicate the timepoint written in ISO 8601 format

tiss_cult_growth_med.name: tiss_cult_growth_med
tiss_cult_growth_med.title: tissue culture growth media
tiss_cult_growth_med.description: Description of plant tissue culture growth media used

toluene.name: toluene
toluene.title: toluene
toluene.description: Concentration of toluene in the sample

tot_depth_water_col.name: tot_depth_water_col
tot_depth_water_col.title: total depth of water column
tot_depth_water_col.description: Measurement of total depth of water column

tot_diss_nitro.name: tot_diss_nitro
tot_diss_nitro.title: total dissolved nitrogen
tot_diss_nitro.description: Total dissolved nitrogen concentration, reported as nitrogen, measured by: total dissolved nitrogen = NH4 + NO3NO2 + dissolved organic nitrogen

tot_iron.name: tot_iron
tot_iron.title: total iron
tot_iron.description: Concentration of total iron in the sample

tot_nitro.name: tot_nitro
tot_nitro.title: total nitrogen concentration
tot_nitro.description: Total nitrogen concentration of water samples, calculated by: total nitrogen = total dissolved nitrogen + particulate nitrogen. Can also be measured without filtering, reported as nitrogen

tot_nitro_cont_meth.name: tot_nitro_cont_meth
tot_nitro_cont_meth.title: total nitrogen content method
tot_nitro_cont_meth.description: Reference or method used in determining the total nitrogen

tot_nitro_content.name: tot_nitro_content
tot_nitro_content.title: total nitrogen content
tot_nitro_content.description: Total nitrogen content of the sample
examples: 35 milligrams Nitrogen per kilogram of soil

tot_org_c_meth.name: tot_org_c_meth
tot_org_c_meth.title: total organic carbon method
tot_org_c_meth.description: Reference or method used in determining total organic carbon

tot_phosp.name: tot_phosp
tot_phosp.title: total phosphorus
tot_phosp.description: Total phosphorus concentration in the sample, calculated by: total phosphorus = total dissolved phosphorus + particulate phosphorus

tot_phosphate.name: tot_phosphate
tot_phosphate.title: total phosphate
tot_phosphate.description: Total amount or concentration of phosphate

tot_sulfur.name: tot_sulfur
tot_sulfur.title: total sulfur
tot_sulfur.description: Concentration of total sulfur in the sample

travel_out_six_month.name: travel_out_six_month
travel_out_six_month.title: travel outside the country in last six months
travel_out_six_month.description: Specification of the countries travelled in the last six months; can include multiple travels

trnas.name: trnas
trnas.title: number of standard tRNAs extracted
trnas.description: The total number of tRNAs identified from the SAG or MAG

trophic_level.name: trophic_level
trophic_level.title: trophic level
trophic_level.description: Trophic levels are the feeding position in a food chain. Microbes can be a range of producers (e.g. chemolithotroph)

turbidity.name: turbidity
turbidity.title: turbidity
turbidity.description: Measure of the amount of cloudiness or haziness in water caused by individual particles

tvdss_of_hcr_press.name: tvdss_of_hcr_press
tvdss_of_hcr_press.title: depth (TVDSS) of hydrocarbon resource pressure
tvdss_of_hcr_press.description: True vertical depth subsea (TVDSS) of the hydrocarbon resource where the original pressure was measured (e.g. 1578 m)

tvdss_of_hcr_temp.name: tvdss_of_hcr_temp
tvdss_of_hcr_temp.title: depth (TVDSS) of hydrocarbon resource temperature
tvdss_of_hcr_temp.description: True vertical depth subsea (TVDSS) of the hydrocarbon resource where the original temperature was measured (e.g. 1345 m)

typ_occup_density.name: typ_occup_density
typ_occup_density.title: typical occupant density
typ_occup_density.description: Customary or normal density of occupants

type_of_symbiosis.name: type_of_symbiosis
type_of_symbiosis.title: type of symbiosis
type_of_symbiosis.description: Type of biological interaction established between the symbiotic host organism being sampled and its respective host

urogenit_disord.name: urogenit_disord
urogenit_disord.title: urogenital disorder
urogenit_disord.description: History of urogenital disorders, can include multiple disorders. The terms should be chosen from the DO (Human Disease Ontology) at http://www.disease-ontology.org, reproductive system disease (https://disease-ontology.org/?id=DOID:15) or urinary system disease (https://disease-ontology.org/?id=DOID:18)

urogenit_tract_disor.name: urogenit_tract_disor
urogenit_tract_disor.title: urine/urogenital tract disorder
urogenit_tract_disor.description: History of urogenital tract disorders; can include multiple disorders. The terms should be chosen from the DO (Human Disease Ontology) at http://www.disease-ontology.org, urinary system disease (https://disease-ontology.org/?id=DOID:18)

ventilation_rate.name: ventilation_rate
ventilation_rate.title: ventilation rate
ventilation_rate.description: Ventilation rate of the system in the sampled premises

ventilation_type.name: ventilation_type
ventilation_type.title: ventilation type
ventilation_type.description: Ventilation system used in the sampled premises

vfa.name: vfa
vfa.title: volatile fatty acids
vfa.description: Concentration of Volatile Fatty Acids in the sample

vfa_fw.name: vfa_fw
vfa_fw.title: vfa in formation water
vfa_fw.description: Original volatile fatty acid concentration in the hydrocarbon resource

vir_ident_software.name: vir_ident_software
vir_ident_software.title: viral identification software
vir_ident_software.description: Tool(s) used for the identification of UViG as a viral genome, software or protocol name including version number, parameters, and cutoffs used

virus_enrich_appr.name: virus_enrich_appr
virus_enrich_appr.title: virus enrichment approach
virus_enrich_appr.description: List of approaches used to enrich the sample for viruses, if any

viscosity.name: viscosity
viscosity.title: viscosity
viscosity.description: A measure of oil's resistance to gradual deformation by shear stress or tensile stress (e.g. 3.5 cp; 100 °C)

volatile_org_comp.name: volatile_org_comp
volatile_org_comp.title: volatile organic compounds
volatile_org_comp.description: Concentration of carbon-based chemicals that easily evaporate at room temperature; can report multiple volatile organic compounds by entering numeric values preceded by name of compound

wall_area.name: wall_area
wall_area.title: wall area
wall_area.description: The total area of the sampled room's walls

wall_const_type.name: wall_const_type
wall_const_type.title: wall construction type
wall_const_type.description: The building class of the wall defined by the composition of the building elements and fire-resistance rating

wall_finish_mat.name: wall_finish_mat
wall_finish_mat.title: wall finish material
wall_finish_mat.description: The material utilized to finish the outer most layer of the wall

wall_height.name: wall_height
wall_height.title: wall height
wall_height.description: The average height of the walls in the sampled room

wall_loc.name: wall_loc
wall_loc.title: wall location
wall_loc.description: The relative location of the wall within the room

wall_surf_treatment.name: wall_surf_treatment
wall_surf_treatment.title: wall surface treatment
wall_surf_treatment.description: The surface treatment of interior wall

wall_texture.name: wall_texture
wall_texture.title: wall texture
wall_texture.description: The feel, appearance, or consistency of a wall surface

wall_thermal_mass.name: wall_thermal_mass
wall_thermal_mass.title: wall thermal mass
wall_thermal_mass.description: The ability of the wall to provide inertia against temperature fluctuations. Generally this means concrete or concrete block that is either exposed or covered only with paint

wall_water_mold.name: wall_water_mold
wall_water_mold.title: wall signs of water/mold
wall_water_mold.description: Signs of the presence of mold or mildew on a wall

wastewater_type.name: wastewater_type
wastewater_type.title: wastewater type
wastewater_type.description: The origin of wastewater such as human waste, rainfall, storm drains, etc

water_cont_soil_meth.name: water_cont_soil_meth
water_cont_soil_meth.title: water content method
water_cont_soil_meth.description: Reference or method used in determining the water content of soil

water_current.name: water_current
water_current.title: water current
water_current.description: Measurement of magnitude and direction of flow within a fluid

water_cut.name: water_cut
water_cut.title: water cut
water_cut.description: Current amount of water (%) in a produced fluid stream; or the average of the combined streams

water_feat_size.name: water_feat_size
water_feat_size.title: water feature size
water_feat_size.description: The size of the water feature

water_feat_type.name: water_feat_type
water_feat_type.title: water feature type
water_feat_type.description: The type of water feature present within the building being sampled

water_frequency.name: water_frequency
water_frequency.title: water delivery frequency
water_frequency.description: Number of water delivery events within a given period of time

water_pH.name: water_pH
water_pH.title: water pH
water_pH.description: pH measurement of some water at the time of sampling

water_prod_rate.name: water_prod_rate
water_prod_rate.title: water production rate
water_prod_rate.description: Water production rates per well (e.g. 987 m3 / day)

water_source_adjac.name: water_source_adjac
water_source_adjac.title: environmental feature adjacent water source
water_source_adjac.description: Description of the environmental features that are adjacent to the farm water source. This field accepts terms under ecosystem (http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/ENVO_01001110) and human construction (http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/ENVO_00000070). Multiple terms can be separated by pipes

water_source_shared.name: water_source_shared
water_source_shared.title: water source shared
water_source_shared.description: Other users sharing access to the same water source. Multiple terms can be separated by one or more pipes

water_temp_regm.name: water_temp_regm
water_temp_regm.title: water temperature regimen
water_temp_regm.description: Information about treatment involving an exposure to water with varying degree of temperature, treatment regimen including how many times the treatment was repeated, how long each treatment lasted, and the start and end time of the entire treatment; can include multiple regimens

watering_regm.name: watering_regm
watering_regm.title: watering regimen
watering_regm.description: Information about treatment involving an exposure to watering frequencies, treatment regimen including how many times the treatment was repeated, how long each treatment lasted, and the start and end time of the entire treatment; can include multiple regimens

weekday.name: weekday
weekday.title: weekday
weekday.description: The day of the week when sampling occurred

weight_loss_3_month.name: weight_loss_3_month
weight_loss_3_month.title: weight loss in last three months
weight_loss_3_month.description: Specification of weight loss in the last three months, if yes should be further specified to include amount of weight loss

wga_amp_appr.name: wga_amp_appr
wga_amp_appr.title: WGA amplification approach
wga_amp_appr.description: Method used to amplify genomic DNA in preparation for sequencing

wga_amp_kit.name: wga_amp_kit
wga_amp_kit.title: WGA amplification kit
wga_amp_kit.description: Kit used to amplify genomic DNA in preparation for sequencing

win.name: win
win.title: well identification number
win.description: A unique identifier of a well or wellbore. This is part of the Global Framework for Well Identification initiative which is compiled by the Professional Petroleum Data Management Association (PPDM) in an effort to improve well identification systems. (Supporting information: https://ppdm.org/ and http://dl.ppdm.org/dl/690)

wind_direction.name: wind_direction
wind_direction.title: wind direction
wind_direction.description: Wind direction is the direction from which a wind originates

wind_speed.name: wind_speed
wind_speed.title: wind speed
wind_speed.description: speed of wind measured at the time of sampling

window_cond.name: window_cond
window_cond.title: window condition
window_cond.description: The physical condition of the window at the time of sampling

window_horiz_pos.name: window_horiz_pos
window_horiz_pos.title: window horizontal position
window_horiz_pos.description: The horizontal position of the window on the wall

window_loc.name: window_loc
window_loc.title: window location
window_loc.description: The relative location of the window within the room

window_mat.name: window_mat
window_mat.title: window material
window_mat.description: The type of material used to finish a window

window_open_freq.name: window_open_freq
window_open_freq.title: window open frequency
window_open_freq.description: The number of times windows are opened per week

window_status.name: window_status
window_status.title: window status
window_status.description: Defines whether the windows were open or closed during environmental testing

window_vert_pos.name: window_vert_pos
window_vert_pos.title: window vertical position
window_vert_pos.description: The vertical position of the window on the wall

window_water_mold.name: window_water_mold
window_water_mold.title: window signs of water/mold
window_water_mold.description: Signs of the presence of mold or mildew on the window

x16s_recover.name: x16s_recover
x16s_recover.title: 16S recovered
x16s_recover.description: Can a 16S gene be recovered from the submitted SAG or MAG?

x16s_recover_software.name: x16s_recover_software
x16s_recover_software.title: 16S recovery software
x16s_recover_software.description: Tools used for 16S rRNA gene extraction

xylene.name: xylene
xylene.title: xylene
xylene.description: Concentration of xylene in the sample

isotope.name: isotope
isotope.title: isotope
isotope.description: The element and mass number of the stable isotope used in isotopologue labeling.

isotopolog.name: isotopolog
isotopolog.title: isotopolog
isotopolog.description: Isotopologue (isotope source/substrate/molecule) added to the biological sample.
comments: List the PubChem Compound Identification (CID) number. If it's an undefined mixture, enter 0.

isotopolog_label.name: isotopolog_label
isotopolog_label.title: isotopolog label status
isotopolog_label.description: List whether the isotopologue added to this biological sample was heavy-labelled or natural abundance

isotopolog_approach.name: isotopolog_approach
isotopolog_approach.title: Labeling approach (number of labeled isotopologs supplied)
isotopolog_approach.description: The labelling approach of this SIP experiment. Details if multiple isotopically labelled isotopologues were added to samples ("multiple"), or was only one isotopologue added to each sample ("single").

gradient_position.name: gradient_position
gradient_position.title: gradient position
gradient_position.description: A number designating the gradient position from heaviest (=1) to lightest. Unfractionated samples, from which fractionated samples were derived, should be denoted with –1.

gradient_pos_rel_am.name: gradient_pos_rel_am
gradient_pos_rel_am.title: relative amount of nucleic acids in the gradient position
gradient_pos_rel_am.description: The total nucleic acids loaded onto the column in this fraction as a decimal. If uploading 16S rRNA gene (or other amplicon) sequencing data, this value should be calculated from qPCR data. If uploading untargetted sequencing data, this value should be calculated from total DNA concentration.

sip_method.name: sip_method
sip_method.title: method for SIP fractionating
sip_method.description: Method used to fractionate nucleic acids.

isotopolog_atom_frac.name: isotopolog_atom_frac
isotopolog_atom_frac.title: atom fraction of isotopolog
isotopolog_atom_frac.description: The fraction of heavy-labelled atoms out of all atoms of a given element in the isotopolog. Multiple values allowed, separated by a | and should be orded the same as the isotopolog.

isotopolog_atom_pos.name: isotopolog_atom_pos
isotopolog_atom_pos.title: set of labeled atoms in isotopologue
isotopolog_atom_pos.description: InChI label designating set of all isotopically enriched atoms in isotopologue. Multiple values allowed, separated by a | and should be orded the same as the isotopolog.

isotopolog_dose.name: isotopolog_dose
isotopolog_dose.title: dose of isotopolog
isotopolog_dose.description: The concentration (in ppm) of isotopolog added to environmental matrix as a total mass per volume.
comments: isotopolog mass / total volume soil; ppm of isotopologue in total container volume

nucleobase_atom_frac.name: nucleobase_atom_frac
nucleobase_atom_frac.title: nucleobase excess atom fraction
nucleobase_atom_frac.description: Excess atom fraction of the nucleobases in this fraction.

isotopolog_incu_time.name: isotopolog_incu_time
isotopolog_incu_time.title: isotopolog incubation time
isotopolog_incu_time.description: Total time of incubation after isotopologue addition in hours

internal_standard.name: internal_standard
internal_standard.title: internal standard method
internal_standard.description: Method used for internal standard for SIP fractionation, if an internal standard was used (i.e., spiking in a heavy-labelled DNA sequence).

samp_dna_conc.name: samp_dna_conc
samp_dna_conc.title: sample dna concentration
samp_dna_conc.description: DNA concentration of sample after dna extraction prior to pooling. Typically measured spectrophotometrically or with a fluorophore.
